Fed interest rate decision March 2026: Holds rates steady

summary: FOMC held benchmark rate at 3.5%-3.75% on April 29, 2026. Unusually contentious 8-4 split — last time 4 dissented was October 1992. Third consecutive hold following three consecutive cuts in 2025. Inflation elevated partly from rising global energy prices. Kevin Warsh advancing to replace Powell as Fed chair.
